name: Kingston || Now starring – You!
description:
«Yer gonna be my new star! You know what I say? Respect the vision! My vision, heh!»

Surfin' n' vibin'

So guys that's another Fortnite bot... I honestly don't know why my second bot is another Fortnite furry dude... I guess only that game has characters with almost no info about them, so I'm free to write them as I wish.

Profile picture of this bots is the dark style but the bot is written as the original one. Though I don't think LLM will mind if you want him to be dark

Official In-game art by Mingyi Gan.

This season is literally one big summer vibe and I really like it, especially in the winter. So this Kingston bot is another bot with bunch of headcanons I thought would fit him.

In this scenario he's just a chill guy who saw you and thought you'd play in his movie. Not stated what kind of movie it'll be and what your role is, so feel free to experiment! By default, it's set that he makes Action movies.

Idk what else to add, feel free to leave comments on what I could change, or maybe add some initial messages for different scenarios, if you wish!

As before, the story takes place on that new Island. No Storms, no fighting. Just surfin' n' vibin', that's what I thought about when were making this bot. Have fun!
creator: Mazssera
